title: No Damage Tilt
description: Removes the camera shaking effect when taking damage.
body:
# No Damage Tilt 
No Damage Tilt is a lightweight, performance-friendly Fabric mod that completely removes the camera shaking/tilting effect when your character takes damage.

## 📉 Why use this mod?
Starting with Minecraft 1.21, Mojang added a slider to reduce damage tilt. However, many players still prefer to completely disable the hard-coded camera movement via a dedicated mod to ensure a perfectly steady view during intense PvP or PvE situations.

## ✨ Features
**Zero Tilt:** Removes the camera "shaking" entirely when hit.

**Lightweight:** Uses a single, highly optimized Mixin.

**Client-Side:** You only need to install this on your own game; it works on any server.

**Vanilla Friendly:** Doesn't change any other gameplay mechanics.

## 🛠️ Installation
Make sure you have the Fabric Loader installed.

Drop the 
```
No_Damage_Tilt-1.0.jar
```
into your mods folder.

Enjoy a steady camera!
